title: Custom Cars
description: Allows the creation of custom vehicles in Minecraft!
body:
A datapack that allows the creation of custom vehicles in Minecraft! See the video below for a more detailed demonstration. (See the Gallery for credits.)

- **NOTE:** If you wish to use this on all created/current worlds, use the Mod version. If you only want this pack on certain worlds, then stick with the Datapack version.

<iframe width="681" height="383" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/O9Fu7FRYWuI" title="[1.13 Vanilla Minecraft] Custom Cars Datapack" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
